_description: S10 — CSV/XLSX formula-injection rules. Used by formula-injection.js, NOT loaded into the generic suspicious-patterns pipeline. Each rule fires AFTER normalizeFormulaPrefix (whitespace strip + fullwidth equals map) AND normalizeXlfn (strip _xlfn. / _xlfn._xlws. multi-prefix). Severity = 'danger' for the function blocklist (dangerous-function match → category='formula-injection'); severity = 'warning' is emitted by formula-injection.js's prefix-only path (FI-02) with numeric/phone suppression, not from this file. Flags: 'i' for case-insensitive function names.
